message:
feat(python): numpy.median wrapper parity (franken_numpy-2uir)

Adds a passthrough wrapper for numpy.median covering axis=None/int/
tuple, `out=` destination, overwrite_input, and keepdims. Test covers
odd/even 1-D, 2-D axis=0/1/None, keepdims shape preservation, NaN
propagation identity to numpy, integer input dtype promotion with
dtype parity, and 3-D tuple-axis=(0,2) reduction. Also registers
masked_all so swarm-mate's unregistered wrapper compiles clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
